arts.ttl: Arsenal owner Kroenke lands £3bn net worth boost after Arteta masterclass
arts.sum: Headlined by on-field success for LA Rams in NFL and Denver Nuggets winning the NBA, Kroenke's sports and entertainment (KSE) portfolio has started to boom. Arsenal are estimated to be worth around £2billion, a big increase over the past year, but still 10th in the global game.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready to rival Arsenal for goal machine Gyokeres
arts.sum: Chelsea ready to rival Arsenal for goal machine Gyokeres Chelsea are keeping a close eye on Viktor Gyokeres ' performances at Sporting CP, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon Thierry Henry trolled by ex-Leeds star - 'That's the end of your career'
arts.sum: Thierry Henry was involved in a tense exchange following CBS Sports Champions League coverage on Wednesday night as he discussed the state of MLS with former Leeds forward Mike Grella

arts.ttl: 'I can confirm': Fabrizio Romano shares what he's heard about the situation of Arsenal 'hero'
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano shares what he's heard about Gabriel Magalhaes' contract situation at Arsenal after his goal against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal consider free agent as centre-forward solution
arts.sum: Arsenal are considering a move to sign Jonathan David on a free transfer from Lille next summer. David is out of contract at the end of the current campaign and has emerged as an option for Arsenal as the Gunners look to sign a striker. Mikel Arteta wants to add a recognised number nine to […] The post Arsenal consider free agent as centre-forward solution first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: William Saliba sends Erling Haaland timely reminder ahead of Man City vs Arsenal clash
arts.sum: William Saliba is looking to stop Erling Haaland in his tracks when Arsenal travel to Manchester City in their early Premier League title showdown on Sunday but first up for the Gunners is a trip to Atalanta in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Sead Kolasinac relishing 'special' Arsenal reunion ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Atalanta won the Europa League last season and will be hoping to get their Champions League campaign off to a strong start against the Gunners

arts.ttl: 'We did our homework': Manager says new signing from Arsenal is 'very smart' after scoring first goal
Calafiori and Saka highlights of Arsenal training as Rice prepares for return
arts.sum: But as already mentioned, Saka did indeed train and looked free to move and join in with the drills and, as expected, will likely play a key role in the upcoming games. He could start his first Arsenal game this week should Arteta opt to give Jurrien Timber something of a rest.

arts.ttl: European giants send scouts to watch Arsenal target
arts.sum: SempreInter.com reports that Juventus scouts were present to watch Canada defeat the United States 2-1 in a friendly in Kansas during the international break. Juve officials attended the game specifically to scout David and were impressed with what they saw as the Lille striker scored what proved to be the decisive second goal.
